prompt: Refactor duplicated billing validation across controller, service, and repository layers while preserving current error codes and test fixtures.
Split a 300-line provider-routing function into policy, scoring, and execution layers without changing cooldown, failover, or telemetry behavior.
Refactor a service layer from synchronous database calls to async repository calls while keeping the public DTOs and CLI output stable.
Extract migration planning from CLI parsing so migration decisions can be unit-tested without shelling out or parsing stdout.
Refactor dashboard rendering so JSON API contracts and HTML formatting are separated, with shared aggregation code.
Consolidate five slightly different token-cost calculators into one pricing engine that handles provider-reported usage overrides.
Refactor a monolithic auth middleware so body parsing, token validation, tenant lookup, and auditing are independently testable.
Replace ad-hoc string parsing of stack traces with structured parser objects while preserving existing diagnostic text.
Refactor route history aggregation to support daily and weekly windows without breaking the existing CLI table format.
Move benchmark report formatting behind a stable JSON-to-Markdown renderer so reports remain reproducible across runs.
